name: Push-up Head Tap
description: Advanced push-up variation where you lower down, shift back to elbows to tap your head, then shift forward and push up.

exercises.name: Push-up Head Tap
exercises.description: Start in push-up position. Lower down, shift back onto elbows with hands tapping head, shift forward back to hands, push up.
exercises.notes: Maintain controlled tempo, engage core throughout.

raw.caption: People don't understand how hard this push up is
raw.visualSummary: A woman in military camo performs multiple fluid reps of push-up head taps on a carpeted floor, transitioning from hands to elbows and back.

uncertainties: Reps estimated as default since not specified in video.
